integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the issues.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the project management web interface, filling out forms, and clicking buttons, rather than using terminal scripts or API tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual project management application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be a functional web application (like Redmine) in a browser, not a local text editor or a mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to insert the issues.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., sqlite3, mysql) being used to insert records directly into the application's database.
